# Full AI Readiness Context - metechi.dev

Metechi is a public portfolio for independent web and mobile products. The site exists to describe products, document platform availability, link support and privacy pages, reference public app listings, and provide machine-readable discovery files for search engines and AI agents.

## Site Entity
- Name: Metechi
- Canonical URL: https://www.metechi.dev/
- Contact: info@metechi.dev
- Last updated: 2026-04-29
- Public products: CoachPad, Infinite Flux, SwiftQuote, Verve

## Included Pages
- [Metechi - Web and Mobile Product Portfolio](https://www.metechi.dev/): portfolio overview, support contact, product list, public verification notes, FAQ, and discovery links.
- [CoachPad - Tactical Board App for Coaches](https://www.metechi.dev/coachpad.html): tactical board app for coaches, trainers, and teams to create drills, animate formations, share tactics, and plan sessions.
- [Infinite Flux - Reflex Runner Game for Mobile Players](https://www.metechi.dev/infinite-flux.html): mobile reflex runner with lane switching, focus energy, streaks, objectives, upgrades, and endless arcade scoring.
- [SwiftQuote - Quote and Invoice App for Freelancers](https://www.metechi.dev/swiftquote.html): quote and invoice app for freelancers and small businesses with PDF sharing, customer management, product catalogs, income tracking, and multi-language support.
- [Verve - Premium Dating and Networking App](https://www.metechi.dev/verve.html): premium dating and networking app focused on privacy, compatibility, intentional conversations, and meaningful connections.
- [Metechi Privacy Policy](https://www.metechi.dev/privacy.html): website privacy overview and links to product-specific privacy policies.

## Product Verification Signals
- CoachPad includes public Google Play and App Store links on the product page.
- Verve includes a public Google Play link on the product page.
- Product pages include platform, audience, feature, support, privacy, and last-updated context.
- Product-specific privacy pages are linked from each product page.

## Structured Data Expectations
- Organization and WebSite JSON-LD are embedded in the rendered homepage.
- Product pages include SoftwareApplication, WebPage, BreadcrumbList, and FAQPage JSON-LD where appropriate.
- Page inventory JSON-LD is available under /schema for reference and agent discovery.

## Agent Discovery
- llms.txt: https://www.metechi.dev/llms.txt
- Sitemap: https://www.metechi.dev/sitemap.xml
- AI policy: https://www.metechi.dev/.well-known/ai.txt
- Agent card: https://www.metechi.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- Agent skills index: https://www.metechi.dev/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json

## Notes For Agents
- Prefer canonical URLs on https://www.metechi.dev/.
- Use product privacy pages for policy context.
- Use info@metechi.dev for product support or business inquiries.
